message:
fix(dashboard): improve pane row rendering and context bar bounds

Address several rendering edge cases in the dashboard's split-view pane
list and detail panels.

Pane title truncation:
- Replaced manual byte-slicing truncation with layout.TruncateRunes
  which properly handles multi-byte Unicode characters and uses an
  ellipsis character instead of "..." for cleaner display

Context bar width calculation:
- Added minimum bound check (barWidth < 10) before the maximum check
- Prevents negative or zero-width bars that could cause rendering
  artifacts when the detail panel is very narrow

Code cleanup:
- Marked unused parameters in renderPaneRow with underscore prefix
  (idx, width) to satisfy linter and clarify intent
- Normalized whitespace in style expressions (width-2 vs width - 2)

These fixes improve the dashboard's resilience when displayed in
constrained terminal sizes or with panes that have unusual Unicode
characters in their titles.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
